source.body_axis_correction: Applied right-handed axis remap [[0,-1,0],[-1,0,0],[0,0,-1]] to the displayed Creo rotation because the pen-body CSYS axis labels in the measurement were known to be uncertain. This remap gave the lowest cross-pose camera_from_world residual.
source.note: Only the rotation part is used. The displayed Creo rotation was treated as dodeca_from_body before applying the body-axis correction; body_from_dodeca is the transpose of the corrected matrix.
